programme.title: Running Dry

programme.title: E99
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

E13 - 大廚禮禮發現愛情鳥？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E55
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E13 - 大廚禮禮發現愛情鳥？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E5 - 楊芸晴變身超腦護航員
programme.desc: 邀請了馬清運、伊能靜、楊芸晴等嘉賓擔任「超腦護航員」；節目根據“八大未來力”的概念來進行項目設置，少年們需要用創造性思維激發想像力，利用從紙筆到程式設計來破解難題，從而喚醒大腦活力，選拔出最具“未來力”的少年。

programme.title: E17 - Brest Dockworkers
programme.desc: They are invisible but essential: the dockworkers moor and undock all the merchant ships that enter and leave the ports. Sailors on land, they live on the watch, just like on a ship. In an increasingly automated world, they are an essential link in global maritime trade.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.desc: In Douala, in a poor district in the city, the everyday life of Pierrette, a seamstress who takes care of her two children and invalid mother alone. Bravely determined and discrete, she is used to getting by from day-to-day but never gives up.

programme.title: E17 - Brest Dockworkers
programme.desc: They are invisible but essential: the dockworkers moor and undock all the merchant ships that enter and leave the ports. Sailors on land, they live on the watch, just like on a ship. In an increasingly automated world, they are an essential link in global maritime trade.

programme.desc: The Chinese Peacekeepers in South Sudan are put to the test by problems inside and outside the UN Headquarters in Juba.

programme.desc: A game designer named Steve Jobs starts a personal computer company in his parents' garage on his way to bringing computers mainstream.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'pyjamas' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today, we see lots of different pyjamas - pink pyjamas, striped pyjamas, spotty pyjamas and banana pyjamas.

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.desc: Greedy Grandmaster Glitch has been gorging on chocolate and wants more! The Grimbots discover a place called the Chocolate Hills on Bohol Island in the Philippines and take him there.

programme.desc: A trip to the art gallery unexpectedly helps Duck with the hunt for his lost toy Rhino.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'pyjamas' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today, we see lots of different pyjamas - pink pyjamas, striped pyjamas, spotty pyjamas and banana pyjamas.

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E38 - The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: E49 - Go Jet Academy: Global Gameshow
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.title: E48 - Chocolate Hills, Philippines
programme.desc: Greedy Grandmaster Glitch has been gorging on chocolate and wants more! The Grimbots discover a place called the Chocolate Hills on Bohol Island in the Philippines and take him there.

programme.title: E36 - Moon's Exhibition
programme.desc: A trip to the art gallery unexpectedly helps Duck with the hunt for his lost toy Rhino.

programme.title: E37 - Pond Prose
programme.desc: Sarah is inspired by listening to a poetry record and decides to make up some poetry of her own.

programme.title: E12 - The Opposites Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels have fun learning what opposites are, with help from their animal friends!

programme.title: E12 - Sweetieland Saga
programme.desc: Evil Pea cheats Chilli out of winning floofy teddies at a funfair made from sweets, so Supertato and the Veggies must get the teddies back before it's too late!

programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: A terrifying threat (Jason Momoa) surfaces from the past and is determined to destroy everything and everyone Dom (Vin Diesel) loves in the family's deadliest mission ever.

programme.desc: The Naxi Tribe's Dongba 'soul-binding' wedding ceremony, soon to disappear, is a cultural treasure. In this episode, Darren witnesses the truly unique wedding!

programme.title: E2 - Skeletons In The Closet
programme.desc: Ahmedabad erupts in protest in support of the fathers who find out the sad truth about their sons' murder close to Asaram's Ashram.

programme.title: E3 - Deepfakes India
programme.desc: Scammers are going hi-tech. They are crafting deepfakes, developing malware and hacking into databases.

programme.title: E2 - You You's Tale
programme.desc: As we learn about the problems that arise from artificially breeding giant pandas, we follow the progress of You You the last panda to give birth this season.

With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

Pakistan tour of Bangladesh, 2026 -Highlights: BAN vs PAK, 2nd ODI
E1 - A Day in the Life of JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Spend a fun-filled day in the life of JJ & his friends! First, Ms. Appleberry takes the Melon Patch kids on a beach field trip to learn about different types of vehicles. Then, JJ gets to bring a special guest to class: his dog, Bingo! Everyone has a great time as Bingo plays, snacks & even saves the day! The adventure continues at the farm, where JJ & Grandpa have to wrangle all the baby animals after they escape from their pen!

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Fun Learning Adventure!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on a fun learning adventure! First, playing dress-up is so much fun! Baby John transforms into a pirate, Jack is an astronaut & Jill is a beautiful princess! Then, 'please' & 'thank you' are very important words, & Baby John learns just how magical they can be. The learning continues as his family helps him to understand the opposite concept of 'open & shut' & Dad helps him play with his brand-new color train!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E1 - A Day in the Life of JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Spend a fun-filled day in the life of JJ & his friends! First, Ms. Appleberry takes the Melon Patch kids on a beach field trip to learn about different types of vehicles. Then, JJ gets to bring a special guest to class: his dog, Bingo! Everyone has a great time as Bingo plays, snacks & even saves the day! The adventure continues at the farm, where JJ & Grandpa have to wrangle all the baby animals after they escape from their pen!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Fun Learning Adventure!

Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Le club Paris direct[Live]
programme.desc: Des experts issus de la géopolitique, des sciences de l'environnement, des sciences sociales et de la culture se réunissent pour analyser et débattre des sujets majeurs qui dominent l'actualité. Leurs échanges offrent des clés de compréhension sur les enjeux contemporains et leurs impacts.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. programme.title: Ligue 1 Specials 2025/26 E38 -Seasons of Greatness - Lens 2022/23
E1020 - Pups Vs. The Hum-Flectors / Pups Save A Capybara
programme.desc: A drone carrying Humdinger's reflecting panel crashes in a tree, the reflector concentrates a beam of light on a wooden bridge, causing it to burn. // The Paw Patrol rescues Winnie and a capybara when they go rolling off in a giant exercise ball.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E421 - Pups Save The Runaway Turtles / Pups Save The Shivering Sheep
programme.desc: Daring Danny X accidently drives off with turtle eggs. // Farmer Al's sheep runaway and Mayor Humdinger's kittens go missing.

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E104 - Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E417 - Champion Daddy Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig loses his title as Champion Puddle Jumper during the Daddi-Olympics, so everyone helps him train to win it back at the Daddi-Olympics.

programme.title: E101 - The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: E1021 - Pups And Cats Save Humcatdingerman / Pups Save A Turbot Tournament
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger becomes HumCatDingerMan to steal the spotlight from the Cat Pack. // The pups must save Granny Tilly when an impromptu Turbot Tournament gets overly competitive.

programme.title: E304 - Show And Share
programme.desc: Dora helps Boots find a special Heart Banana to show everyone at Show and Share.

programme.title: E232 - Ice Skating
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating for the first time. Mummy Pig teaches Peppa to skate and soon she is having lots of fun. Peppa begins to teach George how to skate but it turns out he is a natural born skater. Peppa and George love ice-skating.

programme.title: E622 - Pups Save A Humsquatch / Pups Save A Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch! // When a robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay, Ryder knows who to call to save the far flung flying disc!

programme.title: E221 - Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.desc: Peppa and George are taken to visit the home that Mr Bull is building. Will they find out who their new neighbors are?

programme.title: E1 - Secrets of the Great White Shark
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they’ve helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: E4 - Schooled by a Girl Scout
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth’s wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

programme.title: E6 - A Pirate Ship´s Last Jaunt
programme.desc: A pirate ship on a voyage. The Kogas - a retired pirate ship, is to start a new life as a noble restaurant in Berlin. But the journey to get there will be difficult, for the Kogas is docked in Lithuania. A risky and extremely difficult heavy transport over a distance of one thousand kilometres lies ahead. Because the Kogas weighs almost fifty tonnes, a special ship will take it across the Baltic Sea to Poland, and from there across the Oder and the Havel Canal to Berlin. The last journey of the Kogas - a huge logistical task where not everything will always go according to plan.

programme.title: E3 - Manila
programme.desc: Getting around this city is like navigating a bee hive...except the bees are driving cars, trucks and trikes!

programme.title: E2 - Highlight 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must all his experience to keep his team out of danger. Meanwhile with very little room to manoeuvre Lantern recovery op Steve must rescue a 44-ton artic stuck in a ditch on a busy five lane roundabout. And Lantern Recovery Op Sean has thought on his feet to break into an abandoned truck!

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory

programme.title: E4 - Fresh Water
programme.desc: All life needs water to live. Yet water itself is not constantly available, and animal parents must relentlessly adapt to this challenge.

programme.title: E2 - Building A Sanctuary
programme.desc: Vantara tackles the challenge of housing hundreds of rescued animals in Gujarat. Forrest Galante helps care for the new arrivals, from an orphaned rhino, penguins and bears.

programme.title: E3 - Forests
programme.desc: Forests are both alive and full of life. From the leafy canopy to the forest floor, animals have made these trees their home for tens of thousands of years.

programme.desc: Vantara tackles the challenge of housing hundreds of rescued animals in Gujarat. Forrest Galante helps care for the new arrivals, from an orphaned rhino, penguins and bears.

programme.title: E325
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly abandoned(?) by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: E5 - Super Bowls For The Super Bowl
programme.desc: With commentator Matthieu Proulx, host Isabelle Racicot, actress Marie-Eve Perron, and chef Carolyne Frigon, we prepare super healthy bowls to challenge junk food culture.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Boutillot/Redevelopment/Garden Of The Five Senses
programme.desc: Contents: Julien Boutillot, the market gardener who grows his vegetables to music; the challenges of rewilding forests; the Garden of the Five Senses in Yvoire; Don't panic: back to the retirement home.

programme.title: E5 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Post-Impressionism
programme.desc: We discover the painters Cezanne, Van Gogh, Toulouse-Lautrec, Bonnard, Vuillard... Some of the major post-impressionist artists displayed at the Philadelphia Museum of Art.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The brigade is divided into three teams, and the members of each trio face off by cooking the same fish. During the challenge, an extra ingredient appears and changes everything.

programme.title: E56 - A Student Menu In Limoges
programme.desc: Mathieu, 18, a first year physics student at the University of Limoges, receives a scholarship and has a weekly food budget of 40 euros. Charline, a dietitian, visits the university once a week to help students eat well. Alessandra Montagne meets her.

programme.title: E106
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E19 - A Stroll Along Canal St-Martin
programme.desc: An immersion at the heart of the Canal Saint-Martin reveals a peaceful Paris, far from the urban bustle, where strolling, colorful shops and authentic gastronomy blend harmoniously. The exhibition ''Yves Saint Laurent: Transparences'' at the Musee Saint Laurent, avenue Marceau, in Paris.

programme.title: E4 - Aulos, Reed Music
programme.desc: Max Brumberg, flute designer, has set himself a challenge: that of resurrecting the aulos, an instrument that has lain forgotten for 2,000 years. Resembling a recorder, the aulos produces an enchanting, magical note. In classical times, it was said to hypnotise and bewitch the listening crowds.

programme.title: E56 - A Student Menu In Limoges
programme.desc: Mathieu, 18, a first year physics student at the University of Limoges, receives a scholarship and has a weekly food budget of 40 euros. Charline, a dietitian, visits the university once a week to help students eat well. Alessandra Montagne meets her.

programme.title: E4 - Aulos, Reed Music
programme.desc: Max Brumberg, flute designer, has set himself a challenge: that of resurrecting the aulos, an instrument that has lain forgotten for 2,000 years. Resembling a recorder, the aulos produces an enchanting, magical note. In classical times, it was said to hypnotise and bewitch the listening crowds.

programme.title: News On The Hour 1500
programme.desc: NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.

programme.title: Mainland Q&A (IV)
programme.desc: MAINLAND Q&A: Zero-distance from the heavyweights and top leaders is the draw of this program. It reveals striking details about the thoughts of the most influential decision-makers, telling viewers the pulse of the time.

programme.title: China Financial Intelligence
programme.desc: China Financial Intelligence: Based in Shanghai, the program explores the economic development of mainland China in a comprehensive and in-depth way, so that the world can have a more accurate understanding of China and Shanghai.

programme.title: Phoenix Focus 1800
programme.desc: PHOENIX FOCUS: Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix Focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.

programme.title: News Talk
programme.desc: News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: News Times
programme.desc: News Time is meant to put events into historical perspective. The background and history comparison are supplemented with keen observation, critical thinking and interviews, delivering unique insights into trends, thereby casting light on China's future.

programme.title: Hong Kong Perspectives
programme.desc: Hong Kong Perspectives offers interviews with major SAR government officials, LegCo president, as well as experts from think tanks, the programme explains the essence of the Basic Law and explores how it has been implemented citing examples from the past.

programme.desc: Matt chases a rare copy of the Declaration of Independence in a jam-packed hoard and digs through a 4,000-square-foot chicken coop for vintage motorcycles.

programme.title: Programming Language
programme.desc: How does a computer understand what we want it to do? We use a language that it can understand. Find out about all the different types of languages that are used in programming.

programme.title: Flower Power
programme.desc: Albert eats a flower that gives him super powers, and he uses them to take revenge on the kids who have tormented him throughout his life. But with great power comes great irresponsibility...

programme.title: Programming Language
programme.desc: How does a computer understand what we want it to do? We use a language that it can understand. Find out about all the different types of languages that are used in programming.

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: Tricking Your Temperature and Telling Big Lies
programme.desc: The doctors attempt to trick their body temperature and Dr. Chris tries to train his body to beat a lie-detector machine. In the emergency room, one patient has mystery tummy pains and another has cut his leg on his bike.

programme.title: Gym Day
programme.desc: Today at the pet gym Cassie, the lazy Labrador, goes swimming, and will Fudge, the fat cat, ever get up? Down in the wild woods, the Junior Vets meet even bigger cats – the Eurasian lynx, Europe's third-largest predator!

programme.title: The Pitcher Plant and a Very Sweet Trap
programme.desc: The carnivorous pitcher plants have evolved to trap and digest insects. The small creatures are lured in with sweet nectar. The biggest pitchers are found on the slopes of Mount Kinabalu in Borneo. These can hold over a litre of fluid.

programme.title: Orange Power
programme.desc: When the battery on Darwin's torch runs out just as he needs it most, he uses the power of oranges to get it working again.

programme.title: Family Life in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Meet a peasant family in their daily lives, back in the Middle Ages. Dove and Howler are very busy parents! Besides educating their little urchin kids, welcoming a new baby, dealing with daily home life, life for these peasant parents is eventful to say the least!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: Toothbrush
programme.desc: Be prepared to be ''brushed'' off your feet with this entertaining episode.

programme.title: Pencil
programme.desc: After scribbling away, let's explore some fun DIY ideas.

programme.title: Bhilka Bank
programme.desc: DiktaThor uses Bhilka points to put everyone on Bhilka in deep debt so that he has power over them. The only thing he miscalculated is Sprinter's wit.

programme.title: Trip to Iceland
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing a game that uses family names. Alim joins them, but it turns out that he doesn't have a surname. And he is far from being the only one. Our heroes will probably understand this better if they visit Alim's penfriend Gunnar in Iceland.

programme.title: Queen Of The Swingers
programme.desc: Munki and Trunk spot fruit and race through the jungle. Munki swings easily on vines, but Trunk struggles in the thick foliage. She wants to learn, and Munki will teach her, though inspiring an elephant to swing takes special motivation.

programme.title: It All Falls Down
programme.desc: At the bakery, Luna and friends enjoy ice cream and space stickers-until a dropped cone sparks big questions. Why do things always fall down? Becoming explorers, Luna, Jupiter, and Clyde learn how gravity works on Earth and the Moon.

programme.title: Why Cicadas Don't Like the Wasp
programme.desc: The wasp has to burrow underground to find cicadas. Once it finds one it paralyses it and brings it to its burrow to provide a nesting place for its larvae. Lemurs also like the crunchy taste of cicadas.

programme.title: Orange Power
programme.desc: When the battery on Darwin's torch runs out just as he needs it most, he uses the power of oranges to get it working again.

programme.title: Environmental Science
programme.desc: How do sea animals stay warm in extreme cold? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of environmental science. Have hands-on fun by creating a blubber glove, and get to know Rachel Carson, a marine biologist and chief advocate of global environmentalism.

programme.title: Little Dutch Doki
programme.desc: When Doki is foiled by a 'windmill' on Oto's mini-golf course, the team realizes that they don't actually know what real windmills do. They head off to Holland, the Netherlands to find out.

programme.title: Aliens
programme.desc: Join Host Emily Calandrelli as she explores the latest in science's search for life outside of planet Earth. From Microbes to advanced intelligent beings - recent discoveries are bringing scientists closer than ever to finding alien life.

programme.title: First-Hand Vet Experience
programme.desc: Sam is due to operate on Stella, the dog after she got injured in a car crash. But is he ready to take part in urgent surgery? Plus, the Junior Vets join the emergency response team at the races and help heal hurt hooves down on the Vet School farm.

programme.title: Trip to Iceland
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing a game that uses family names. Alim joins them, but it turns out that he doesn't have a surname. And he is far from being the only one. Our heroes will probably understand this better if they visit Alim's penfriend Gunnar in Iceland.

programme.title: Orange Power
programme.desc: When the battery on Darwin's torch runs out just as he needs it most, he uses the power of oranges to get it working again.

programme.title: Pencil
programme.desc: After scribbling away, let's explore some fun DIY ideas.

programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: Mansoor and Mukku fall in love across religious barriers, but misunderstandings, family pressure, and a devastating disaster test their bond and change their lives forever. Release Year: 2018 Director: Abhishek Kapoor Awards: 2019 Winner Main Award- Best Debut ActreSS- Sara Ali Khan, 2019 Winner GQ Men of the Year Award- Breakthrough Talent- Sara Ali Khan

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: When Tara Singh vanishes during a battle and is believed captured, his son Jeete risks everything to rescue him, facing deadly dangers to bring his father home. Release Year: 2023 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: E1 - The Parshall Family

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: In this episode, Mridula reveals incredible luxury in the Anahita Resort in Beau Champ, Samuel is working in La Balise, Rinie and Manon show a huge estate in Bel Hombre, Grahame is in Tamarina in Tamarin West, and Nawsheen reveals a beautiful home in Mont Choisy on the North of the island.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Kathryn, who's lived on the same London street for 60 years, is building a mirror image of her Edwardian home, right next door, but with a 21st-century twist.

programme.title: E3 - Isolated Retreats
programme.desc: Explore a rocky retreat in the mountains of South Africa. Relax at a luxury bolthole in the Welsh countryside and check in to a forest treehouse near Australia's Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: E9 - Episode 9: Autumn
programme.desc: Jamie rounds up his autumnal offerings with some gorgeous squash in a cheesy sauce, a zingy celeriac dressing for his remoulade and a foraged blackberry, apple and pear cobbler.

The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Return To Paradise
programme.desc: Follows college students Red and Eden, who fall in love after being stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash, only to face challenges from their families' feud after they're rescued.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E12 - Lucca
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E9 - No Gravity, No Problem

programme.desc: Discover how crispy, lip-smacking Kettle potato chips are specially crinkled for maximum dipping power; sweet, melt-in-your-mouth meringue cookies get their delicate texture in an unconventional oven.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: Discover how an aromatic blend of exotic spices is packed into pakoras, a mouthwatering, deep-fried Indian fritter; the bakers of decadently custardy Napoleon bars fold thousands of tiny layers into flaky French pastry; fiery jalapeno peppers are added to a creamy, nutty hummus.

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E903 - Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E111 - Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: E312 - Squidness Protection / Dome Alone
programme.desc: Squidward's amazing new life in witness protection is threatened after SpongeBob and Patrick discover his whereabouts. // While stuck in her dome, Sandy suspects Plankton's up to no good and recruits Patrick to investigate.

programme.title: E507 - Cow Pie Kid / Saved by the Spell
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team. // Lincoln's friends try to stop him from performing a magic act at the middle school talent show.

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens / Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him! // Eager to become Master Criminals, Lil & Jack help Chuck with his 'dirty laundry'. But are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.desc: No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

Baogu At the Movie E285 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Seobok
programme.desc: Former intelligence agent Ki-hun, who lives a secluded life as a result of a traumatic memory, is entrusted by his former boss with a secret mission to transfer humanity's first cloned human, called Seobok, to a safe location. However, the mission goes awry when the convoy is ambushed by unknown attackers. Ki-hun and Seobok manage to escape together, but struggle awaits them around every corner as Seobok has spent his entire life in a lab and is fascinated by the outside world while Ki-hun only wants to complete his mission as soon as possible. As the two repeatedly butt heads, various groups with conflicting agendas chase after Seobok, who is humanity's greatest salvation but also its greatest threat. When the enemy finally closes in, Ki-hun and Seobok are forced to make the inevitable choice.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E260 -Dongji Rescue
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Four Trails
programme.desc: At the time, they said it couldn't be done. In 2012, Andre Blumberg set off by himself, to run all four of Hong Kong's iconic ultra distance trails in just four days. 298km and over 14,500m of climbing later, one of the hardest ultra marathons in the world - the Hong Kong Four Trails Ultra Challenge - was born. With the 2021 edition of the challenge as the backdrop, 'Four Trails' takes you on a journey from when the concept was first was conceived to it's current format. Under 60 hours to be deemed a 'Finisher' and under 72 hours to be a ‘Survivor', unsupported and with an ever evolving set of rules. It takes a deep dive into the famous four trails that make up the challenge and you will both laugh and cry as the astonishing stories of those who dare attempt such a feat unfold.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Chin Siu Ho
programme.desc: Being a well-known martial art movie star, Chin Siu Ho talks about his stories and personal feelings from such long journey. When got into acting since childhood, Siu Ho reveals that the encounter with Chang Cheh and Sammo Hung were the benefactors of his acting life and how he went through the mill to make action movies in the ‘80s. In particular, he has recalled his injury and hardship at the set of Hong Kong classic action-comedy ‘Mr. Vampire' that one of the scenes simply had him retaken for eight times! To know about the behind-the-scene of Hong Kong ‘80s action movies, let Siu Ho tell you more in this episode!

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Long ago in China, corpses are supposed to be able to follow orders given by a leader and 'jump' to their respective burial places. However, some drug dealers use this method to smuggle opium. Things are going well until the local aristocrat, Master Miu, murders a singer's husband as he fails in attempting to rape her. He asks the corpse leader to take the body away. Then, one of the members from drug dealers is killed mysteriously. When the drug dealers try to go after the case, they find a strange corpse sucking in a huge snake in an old tower. Many members are killed as they try to get out in time...

programme.title: E5 - Not So Pretty In Pink
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: Wife and expectant mother Lola seems to have it all: the big house, a dashing husband, and a thriving restaurant. But Lola's perfect life is interrupted when a ghost from the past suddenly shows up.

programme.desc: A manmade lake in Minneriya National Park supports the largest concentration of elephants in Asia. Follow a young male who has reached a turning point toward adulthood. In the rainforest, jungles teem with a variety of bizarre species of insects.
